homepage.faq.titleAccent.message: Everything You Want to Know is Here

homepage.faq.q1.message: Which macOS versions does LinguaX support?

homepage.faq.a1.message: LinguaX supports macOS 13.0 Ventura and higher, perfectly compatible with all Mac devices with Intel and Apple Silicon chips. Specially optimized for the latest macOS systems.

homepage.faq.q2.message: Will it affect system performance as a menu bar app?

homepage.faq.a2.message: Absolutely not. LinguaX uses efficient lightweight architecture, app size less than 5MB, extremely low memory usage, almost zero CPU usage. Specially optimized for menu bar environment, won't affect system performance.

homepage.faq.a3.message: LinguaX provides two configuration methods: app binding and domain binding. You can assign dedicated input methods for each app, or configure input methods for different website domains. With accessibility permission enabled, switching browser tabs will auto-switch input method based on domain.

homepage.faq.q4.message: What is Accessibility Mode? Why do I need to enable it?

homepage.faq.a4.message: Accessibility Mode is a system permission provided by macOS. Once enabled, LinguaX can detect the current website domain in browsers. This allows more granular control: when switching between browser tabs, input method automatically switches based on the domain you configured.

homepage.faq.q5.message: How is data security and privacy guaranteed?

homepage.faq.a5.message: LinguaX strictly follows Apple's privacy policy, all configuration data is stored locally, never collects or uploads any personal information. Accessibility permission is only used to read browser tab information, ensuring your privacy is absolutely safe.

homepage.cta.description.message: Join nearly two thousand users and experience the most natural input method switching.

homepage.cta.descriptionStrong.message: Free trial, no ads, privacy protection, continuous updates.

pricing.faq.trial.question.message: How does the 30-day trial license work?

pricing.faq.trial.answer.message: Create a 30-day trial license completely free by entering your email. Each license provides full access to all LinguaX features. You can create new trial licenses repeatedly as needed.

pricing.faq.lifetime.question.message: What does the lifetime license purchase include?

pricing.faq.lifetime.answer.message: One-time payment of $9.9 USD gives you 99 years of license access, lifetime app updates, support for up to 3 devices, and email customer support.

pricing.faq.devices.question.message: How many devices can I activate with my license?

pricing.faq.devices.answer.message: Your lifetime license can be activated on up to 3 devices simultaneously. You can manage device activations through your account.

pricing.faq.support.question.message: What support is included with license purchase?

pricing.faq.support.answer.message: Lifetime license holders receive email customer support at hello@linguax.app. Trial users can access documentation and community support.

homepage.features.mouse.description.message: Smooth scrolling and reverse scrolling for third-party mice, experience Magic Mouse-like fluidity

homepage.faq.q6.message: What is Mouse Enhancement? Do I need this feature?

homepage.faq.a6.message: Mouse Enhancement is designed for third-party mouse users. It provides smooth scrolling that simulates trackpad inertia for a silky natural feel, and reverse scrolling that controls mouse wheel direction independently while keeping trackpad natural scrolling direction. If you use a third-party mouse and want a better scrolling experience, this feature is perfect for you.

homepage.faq.q7.message: Does the lifetime license support refunds?

homepage.faq.a7.message: We offer a 3-day no-questions-asked refund guarantee. If you're not satisfied with the product after purchasing the lifetime license, you can contact hello@linguax.app within 3 days of purchase to request a full refund without providing a reason. We want every user to be satisfied with LinguaX.

pricing.faq.refund.question.message: Does the lifetime license support refunds?

landing.home.hero.title.line2.message: Keep your typing context steady, too.

landing.home.hero.description.message: LinguaX starts with Mouse+: smoother scrolling, reliable button/gesture mapping, and app-specific behavior for third-party mice. Then it adds input automation by app and website domain, so your day feels less interrupted and more focused.
